svg.title: Hamster idle glasses push v1
svg.desc: Idle insert animation: the hamster leans in, adjusts its sunglasses, then returns to idle with both back hands restored.
svg.metadata: {"state":"idle","variant":"idle-glasses-push","version":"idle-glasses-push-v1","source":"drafts/working-motion-v1/working-2session-v1/hamster-idle-glasses-push-v1.html","finalized":"2026-06-12","durationMs":5200,"sequence":["idle","pose-1","pose-2","pose-3","pose-2","pose-3","pose-2","pose-1","pose-4","idle"],"note":"Derived from 2-session pose tuning, exported as a standalone idle insert with no session bubbles."}

g.title: Hamster flat layered master v18 capsule hands
g.desc: Light-palette layered hamster master with V18 capsule hands: one rounded bar per hand, with the warm paw color as the capsule end segment. Hands sit above the body and tie, below the head and face; character mid-line stays at 187.

g.data-desc: hamster short tail, circle; resting at body center (behind belly), revealed by turn pages sliding sideways
